title: STAR WARS: Project The Force {SWPTF}
description: A project that will completely immerse you in a Galaxy far, far away;)
body:
# **D E S C R I P T I O N**
**_''It was a long time ago, in a galaxy far, far away...''_ — George Walton Lucas, Jr.**
###   - **W H A T _ T H E _ M O D _ A D D S ?**
 Right now, the mod only adds Jedi force abilities, and that's not all yet, but only telekinesis.

**How to use it?**
> _First, you need to become force-sensitive (more details below)._
> _And so if you have the power, then we can move on._
> 
> _To manipulate entities, you need to **look at the entity's hitbox and press the 'R' key**._ 
> 
> _To manipulate blocks and entity blocks, you need to **look at the block, hold down the shift and press the 'R' key.**_

**How do I change the key bind?**
```
Game Menu -> Options -> Controls -> Key Binds -> Miscellaneous(tab) -> Telekinesis -> [Press any key]
```

**How to become force-sensitive?**
>   _At the moment, there is no vanilla way in fashion to become force-sensitive. But you can try the abilities from the Alpha version of the mod. To do this:_
> 1. _Download the mod (Obviously),_
> 2. _Enter the world/ server where you have operator status,_
> 3. _First we write the command: ``` /forceuser </entity>/ </true/false>/ ```,_
> 4. _We write the command again, only this one: ``` /forcechoose </entity>/ </jedi/sith/gray_jedi>/ ```,_
> 5. _Everything!! You can use force just like a real Force User!_
> 6. _P.S. It is very important to write the selectors as shown in the example with a small letter when choosing the side of the force!_
###   - **W H Y _ T H I S _ E X A C T L Y _ M O D ?**
> 1. _**The project is under active development**, you can influence the development with your feedback. My personal account and discord are always open to you!_
> 2. _**For fans from fans**! I really love this universe and operate outside of commercial interests._ 
> 3. _Even though I'm the only one in the team, **I'm an enthusiast**, I'm both a coder and an artist. This is my hobby, and I don't get paid and I do it just to finish._
###   - **F U T U R E _ O F _ T H E _ P R O J E C T ?**
>   - _I don't want to say anything to spoiler, but I'll just tell you about the names of updates and releases:_
>  
> 1. STAR WARS: Project the force (Ilum)
> 2. STAR WARS: Project the force (Revenge Of The Sith)
> 3. STAR WARS: Project the force (Ships)
> 3. STAR WARS: Project the force (Mandalor)
> 4. STAR WARS: Project the force (Bounty Hunters)
> 5. STAR WARS: Project the force (Night Sisters)
> 6. STAR WARS: Project the force (The Clone Wars Atmosphere)
> 
###   - **T E X T U R E _ S T Y L E ?**
>   - In the fashion itself, so far there are no textures other than stamina, so here's an example for you-the concept art of lightsabers. and may there be not only lightsabers, but also fighting styles for them.
>   ![Concept art: Cal Kastis' Lightsaber](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/430612c431137e64145060ac318027c732ef88bb.png)
